sources.name: Switching Costs
sources.rationale: operating margin 80% vs 25% industry (extreme pricing power); gross margins 73% indicate premium pricing / low substitution

sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: premium gross margins 73% reflect brand/IP power; large revenue base (90B) enables sustained IP investment

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: explosive 346% revenue growth (flywheel spinning); high EPS growth 1368% (operating leverage from scale)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins 73% well above 50% industry; operating margin 80% vs 25% (extreme efficiency); significant scale ($90B revenue)

analysis: Switching Costs and Intangible Assets and Network Effect create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
